market.title: Voice Market
market.desc: High-quality voice models to bring your text to life.

clone.title: Clone Voice
clone.stepInfoDesc: Set up basic info for your voice model. This helps you find it quickly in your voice library.
clone.voiceDescPlaceholder: Describe the voice traits, e.g. gentle, steady, professional...
clone.legalDesc: I confirm that I am using my own real voice for cloning, or I have obtained explicit legal authorization from the voice owner. Using unauthorized voices will result in account suspension.
clone.agree: I have read and fully agree to the above terms
clone.stepMethodDesc: Providing high-quality audio samples is key to generating realistic voice clones.
clone.recordDesc:
Standard reading text provided
Recommended in a quiet, echo-free environment
clone.uploadDesc:
Pre-recorded high-quality dry audio
Supports MP3, WAV (1-5 minutes)
clone.recordHint: Please read the following text in a natural, steady tone:
clone.uploadHint: For best results, upload clean voice audio without background noise.
clone.dropHere: Click or drag files here to upload
clone.supportedFormats:
Formats: MP3, WAV, M4A, FLAC
Duration: 1-5 min | Max: 50MB
clone.trainingDesc: Deep learning is analyzing your voice features and building high-precision voiceprint parameters. This usually takes about 1-2 minutes.

readingText: Spring has arrived, and everything is coming back to life. In this beautiful season, nature displays its most charming vitality. We can hear birds singing joyfully on branches, see flowers swaying gently in the breeze. Technology allows us to preserve these wonderful moments, even transforming our voices into digital memories that last forever. Please feel the warmth these words bring you, and read them aloud with your most authentic voice.
